hero.badge: MSc Cyber Security Research — Coventry University
hero.title1: Find Exactly How Hackers Would Attack
hero.title2: Your IoT Devices — Before They Do
hero.subtitle: AIPET automates the discovery, testing, and prioritisation of vulnerabilities across your IoT devices — with explainable AI that tells you not just what is vulnerable, but exactly why.

features.attackModulesDesc: MQTT, CoAP, HTTP, Firmware, Recon — full IoT coverage out of the box.
features.explainableAIDesc: SHAP-powered predictions tell you exactly why each device is at risk.
features.owaspDesc: Complete coverage of all 10 OWASP IoT vulnerability categories.
features.dashboardDesc: Live scan status, findings, and AI analysis in one place.
features.apiDesc: Integrate AIPET into your CI/CD pipelines with API key access.
features.reportsDesc: Professional assessment reports ready to share with clients.

pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Upgrade when you need more.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: Three steps to complete IoT security
howItWorks.step1Desc: Point AIPET at your network. It discovers every IoT device and tests each one for vulnerabilities in under 60 seconds.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Our explainable AI tells you exactly why each device is vulnerable, what it would cost if exploited, and how a hacker would attack.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Get exact remediation commands, track your fixes, and generate NIS2, NIST, and ISO 27001 compliance reports instantly.

cta.title: Start protecting your IoT devices today
cta.subtitle: Free forever. No credit card required. Setup in under 60 seconds.

footerTagline: AI-Powered IoT Security Platform. Built as MSc Cyber Security research at Coventry University.
featuresTitle: Everything you need to secure your IoT
